title: Enderscape More Emissives
description: Additional emissive textures for Enderscape, a remake of Lum for updated Enderscape.
body:
Additional emissive textures for [Enderscape](https://modrinth.com/mod/enderscape).

After seeing [Enderscape](https://modrinth.com/mod/enderscape) updated to 1.21+ I remembered an old popular resource pack named [Lum](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/lum). But it didn't get any update so I wanted to remake it. You can find images about resource pack in [gallery](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/enderscape-more-emissives/gallery). I hope y'all enjoy it.

This resource pack requires [Enderscape](https://modrinth.com/mod/enderscape)(obviously), [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) and [[ETF] Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures).

Thanks Lunarbunten for the mod and updating it!
